haptic_da7280_init.message0: Init Haptic Driver DA7280 %1 Motor Type %2
haptic_da7280_init.tooltip: Initialize DA7280 haptic driver (I2C default address 0x4A), select LRA or ERM motor type

haptic_da7280_set_mode.tooltip: Set DA7280 operating mode: DRO (Direct Register Output), RTWM, ETWM or Disabled

haptic_da7280_enable_accel.tooltip: Enable or disable DA7280 acceleration feedback algorithm
